'''rathunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placeholder|placeholder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placeholder|placeholder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rathunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræthinith|ræthinith]] || [[word:ræthinij|ræthinij]] || [[word:ræthinish|ræthinish]] || [[word:ræthini|ræthini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathuthunuth|rathuthunuth]] || [[word:rathuthunuj|rathuthunuj]] || [[word:rathuthunush|rathuthunush]] || [[word:rathuthunu|rathuthunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathunuth|rathunuth]] || [[word:rathunuj|rathunuj]] || [[word:rathunush|rathunush]] || [[word:rathunu|rathunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathufnuth|rathufnuth]] || [[word:rathufnuj|rathufnuj]] || [[word:rathufnush|rathufnush]] || [[word:rathufnuf|rathufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rathunuthu|rathunuthu]] || [[word:rathunuju|rathunuju]] || [[word:rathunushu|rathunushu]] || [[word:rathunuku|rathunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rathunuth|rathunuth]] || [[word:rathunuj|rathunuj]] || [[word:rathunush|rathunush]] || [[word:rathunu|rathunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rathunuthul|rathunuthul]] || [[word:rathunujul|rathunujul]] || [[word:rathunushul|rathunushul]] || [[word:rathunukul|rathunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rathunuthuthu|rathunuthuthu]] || [[word:rathunujuju|rathunujuju]] || [[word:rathunushushu|rathunushushu]] || [[word:rathunuku|rathunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rathunuthun|rathunuthun]] || [[word:rathunujun|rathunujun]] || [[word:rathunushun|rathunushun]] || [[word:rathunukun|rathunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rathunuthuoro|rathunuthuoro]] || [[word:rathunujuoro|rathunujuoro]] || [[word:rathunushuoro|rathunushuoro]] || [[word:rathunukuoro|rathunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
